goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'arrive by 18:15'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'hamilton lodge'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '2 nights' starting from 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should arrive by 18:15
The train should go to stansted airport and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called hamilton lodge
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
